channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Friday, May 1, 2026
item.description: Three threads deserve your attention this Friday, Midya. First, Canada's new IRCC study permit cuts and work-hour cap land just as European institutions are ramping up their own global recruitment — the competitive landscape for international students is shifting fast, and Canadi...
